query:
SELECT g.id, g.gameDate, g.sport, g.status,
       g.awayTeamId, g.homeTeamId,
       at.name AS awayName, at.abbreviation AS awayAbbr, at.slug AS awaySlug,
       ht.name AS homeName, ht.abbreviation AS homeAbbr, ht.slug AS homeSlug
FROM games g
JOIN teams at ON g.awayTeamId = at.id
JOIN teams ht ON g.homeTeamId = ht.id
WHERE g.gameDate = '2026-03-08' AND g.sport = 'NBA'
ORDER BY g.startTime ASC;
